headline: Best No Foreign Transaction Fee Credit Cards of March 2026

video.name: No Foreign Transaction Fee Credit Cards Explained: How To AVOID International Fees | NerdWallet
video.description:
Traveling often requires dealing with foreign currencies and converting your money to the local currency, plus potential transaction fee's. Travel and Credit Card Nerd Sally French shares how you can save on all of this by utilizing a no foreign transaction fee credit card. She explains what this is, how to best use them when traveling, and some cards for you to consider.

Suggested Articles:

0:00 - Intro
0:41 - Fair Credit Billing Act Explained
1:02 - Foreign Transaction Credit Cards Explained
2:23 - What To Know About Getting A Currency Exchange 
4:31 - Conclusion
